description: Response body for GET /v1/lane — paginated list of delegated Assisted Remediation findings. Elements are LaneFindingItem (without bundle enrichment; use GET /v1/lane/{id} for bundle). Crosses the API boundary (ADR-056 D7 criterion 6). Authority: ADR-056 Wave 3 (#366). Source: src/api/v1/schemas.py, class LaneFindingListResponse.

count.description: Total number of delegated findings matching the query (may exceed len(findings) if pagination is applied).

findings.description: Page of LaneFindingItem entries (contracts.lane_finding_item). Ordered by created_at ascending.
